seo_title.zh: 线缆标签解决方案 | ETIA

seo_desc.en: Flame-retardant, UL-listed and general-purpose wire & cable labels — matched to your duty level, flame rating and certification needs.
seo_desc.zh: 无卤阻燃、UL 认证与通用线缆标签，按工况等级、阻燃性能与认证资质匹配选型。

eyebrow.zh: 按行业 · 通讯与线缆

slogan.en: Reliable identification that keeps systems running safely
slogan.zh: 可靠标识，保障系统安全运行

zh: 在通讯传输、工业自控、新能源及车载电气系统中，线缆线束是设备运转的核心载体，专业标识是实现线路识别、运维检修、全周期追溯的关键基础。当下设备集成度、布线密度持续提升，线缆长期面临高频弯折、温湿度交变、复杂介质侵蚀等严苛工况，传统普通标签性能短板凸显，极易出现起翘脱落、字迹脱墨模糊等问题，易造成线路混淆、运维误判，直接威胁电气与通讯系统的稳定安全运行
伴随行业安全标准持续升级，阻燃防护、无卤环保、抗老化、高贴合稳定性已成为高端线缆标识的核心选型刚需。常规商用标签缺乏阻燃能力、耐候性差，无法满足储能、车载、精密工控等高端场景的合规验收标准。工况适配的专用线缆标识方案，可长效稳固贴合、清晰留存标识、阻断火情隐患，有效规避运维与安全风险，是保障通讯链路通畅、电气系统稳定、工程合规交付的重要配套支撑
en: Across telecom, industrial automation, new-energy and automotive electrical systems, cables and harnesses are the backbone of every machine, and professional identification is the basis for circuit identification, maintenance and full-lifecycle traceability. As integration and wiring density keep rising, cables face constant flexing, thermal-humidity cycling and aggressive media; ordinary labels lift, peel and smear, causing circuit confusion and maintenance errors that directly threaten the safe, stable operation of electrical and communication systems.

As safety standards tighten, flame retardance, halogen-free chemistry, aging resistance and secure adhesion have become core selection criteria for high-end cable identification. Ordinary commercial labels lack flame resistance and weather durability and cannot meet the compliance requirements of energy-storage, automotive and precision-control applications. A purpose-built cable label that stays bonded, stays legible and helps contain fire risk mitigates maintenance and safety risks, and is essential support for reliable links, stable electrical systems and compliant project delivery.

intro.en: Two flagship models: Polyonics XF-603 and 1306. All halogen-free flame-retardant with official UL certification, offering high-temperature, aging and chemical resistance — for aerospace, new-energy and high-end industrial-control applications with strict compliance requirements.
intro.zh: 包含 Polyonics XF-603、1306 两款主力型号。全系无卤阻燃，拥有官方 UL 合规认证，具备耐高温、抗老化、耐化学腐蚀等优势，性能稳定可靠，适用于航空、新能源、高端工控等严苛工况与高合规要求项目

line.en: 1 mil halogen-free PI · 300°C peak · UL94 VTM-0
line.zh: 1mil 无卤聚酰亚胺 · 峰值300℃ · UL94 VTM-0
36μm 亚透明自覆膜 PET · UL/cUL

intro.en: Covers E2931 and E-6033. Halogen-free flame-retardant formulation with strong adhesion, supporting both wrap and flag application — meeting baseline industrial fire-safety needs with broad compatibility and strong value.
intro.zh: 涵盖 E2931、E-6033 型号。采用无卤阻燃配方，粘贴附着力强，支持线缆缠绕、对粘两种贴标方式，可满足工业基础防火安全需求，工况适配性广，整体性价比突出

line.zh: 无卤阻燃 · 缠绕/对粘
无卤阻燃 · 规格待核实

name.zh: 经济通用 · 无阻燃无认证

intro.en: Represented by E4532. Soft and easy to wrap, for ambient general wiring only — no flame rating, no certification; basic circuit identification for low-cost general projects.
intro.zh: 代表型号为 E4532。材质柔软、可轻松缠绕线缆，仅适配常温普通布线场景，无阻燃性能、无相关认证，主打基础线路标识功能，适合低成本通用工程项目选型

line.zh: 常温普通布线 · 无阻燃无认证
